snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल

localized.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
localized.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana

snippet.title: Bad Boy Karthik Trailer | Naga Shaurya | Vidhi Yadav | Samuthirakani | Harris Jayraj |  Ramesh
snippet.description:
Get ready for the action-packed ride with the Bad Boy Karthik trailer! 🔥🎬

Starring Naga Shaurya, Vidhi Yadav, and Samuthirakani, this film promises intense action, gripping drama, and powerful performances. With music by Harris Jayaraj and direction by Ramesh, the trailer sets the tone for a thrilling cinematic experience.

Packed with attitude, style, and high-energy moments, Bad Boy Karthik is all set to make a strong impact! 💥

RELEASING IN THEARESS WORLDWIDE ON APRIL 17th, 2026.

#BadBoyKarthik #NagaShaurya #TeluguTrailer

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa Directed by Priyadarshan in Bhooth Bangla Movie In Cinemas 16 Apr is set for Comedy with Horror Twist competing with Bhool Bhulaiyaa Kartik Aaryan Franchise & Manjulika Nostalgia competition. Bhooth Bangla Trailer hits hard on the spot with Fun Humour & dark Storytelling with lot of surprises, Trailer Reaction & full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar crack Box Office with Bhooth Bangla- Do leave Comments below.

#BhoothBangla #BhoothBanglaTrailer #AkshayKumar

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE  #gta5 #gtav #gaming
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6 

  #gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn
Music Team: Nivin Raphael, Rithu Vysakh, Moses Toby
Trailer Music Mixed and Mastered - Abin Paul

snippet.title: Matka King - Official Trailer | Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Gulshan Grover | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Matka King Official Trailer
Starring Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Sai Tamhankar, Bhupendra Jadawat, Siddharth Jadhav, Gulshan Grover, Bharat Jadhav, Girish Kulkarni, Jamie Lever, Kishor Kadam, Cyrus Sahukar, Arpita Sethiya, Sambhaji Tangade, Ishtiyak Khan, Sanjivv Jotangia, Simran Ashwini
Produced by - Siddharth Roy Kapur, Nagraj Popatrao Manjule, Gargi Kulkarni, Ashwini Sidwani, Ashish Aryan
Created and Written by - Abhay koranne & Nagraj popatrao Manjule
Created & Directed by - Nagraj popatrao Manjule

Official Release Date - April 17, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called ‘Matka’, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

Presenting Arvind Akela Kallu & Shilpi Raj New Bhojpuri Song 2026 – Nathiya Utare La / नथिया उतारे ला Official Full Video. Kallu aur Shilpi Raj ki superhit jodi ek baar phir lekar aayi hai ek high-energy Bhojpuri dance number jo audience ko turant connect karega. Baby Kajal ka performance, catchy lyrics aur Priyanshu Singh ka music is gaane ko repeat value wala viral track banata hai.

Singers: Arvind Akela Kallu & Shilpi Raj
Feat: Arvind Akela Kallu & Baby Kajal
Lyrics: Ashutosh Tiwari
Music: Priyanshu Singh
Film Title: Bargadwali Gharwali 
Producer: Ansuman Singh Film Creation Pvt Ltd 
Director: Raj Kishore Prasad (Raju)
Lead Actors: Arvind Akela Kallu Ji, Preeti Shukla, Baby Kajal, Dev Singh, Sujan Singh, Anita Rawat

snippet.title: GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA Official Bodo Music Video 2026 | Nikita Boro | Asha Boro | Sudemsona | Lee Shaan
snippet.description:
NIKITA BORO OFFICIAL Presents

"GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA "
A Latest Bodo Music Video 2026

Produced by-- SANJ



“Gubun Raijwni Nonga” sung by Aasha Boro and Nikitaa Boro is a beautiful musical piece that blends emotion with melody. The composition by "Swmkhwr Daimari" adds a rich and captivating musical layer that perfectly complements the mood of the track, The song carries a deep cultural essence, reflecting love, longing, and heartfelt expression through its lyrics and soulful voices.
                 What truly elevates the song is the stunning choreography by " Lee Shaan Ramy" who brings the music to life through graceful and powerful dance movements. Every step reflects the essence of the song, making it not just something to listen to, but something to feel and experience.
            Overall, “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands as a perfect blend of melody, emotion, and visual storytelling—leaving a lasting impression on its audience

Both singers bring a unique charm to the track—Asha Boro’s soothing tone and Nikita Boro’s expressive delivery perfectly complement each other.
The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity



AUDIO CREDITS

localized.title: GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA Official Bodo Music Video 2026 | Nikita Boro | Asha Boro | Sudemsona | Lee Shaan
localized.description:
NIKITA BORO OFFICIAL Presents

"GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA "
A Latest Bodo Music Video 2026

Produced by-- SANJ



“Gubun Raijwni Nonga” sung by Aasha Boro and Nikitaa Boro is a beautiful musical piece that blends emotion with melody. The composition by "Swmkhwr Daimari" adds a rich and captivating musical layer that perfectly complements the mood of the track, The song carries a deep cultural essence, reflecting love, longing, and heartfelt expression through its lyrics and soulful voices.
                 What truly elevates the song is the stunning choreography by " Lee Shaan Ramy" who brings the music to life through graceful and powerful dance movements. Every step reflects the essence of the song, making it not just something to listen to, but something to feel and experience.
            Overall, “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands as a perfect blend of melody, emotion, and visual storytelling—leaving a lasting impression on its audience

Both singers bring a unique charm to the track—Asha Boro’s soothing tone and Nikita Boro’s expressive delivery perfectly complement each other.
The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

fr-FR.title: Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2 | Bande-annonce finale
fr-FR.description:
Découvrez la nouvelle bande-annonce du Diable s'habille en Prada 2, accompagnée de la chanson originale « Runway » interprétée par Lady Gaga et Doechii. Réservez vos places dès maintenant et vivez l'expérience du film exclusivement au cinéma le 1er mai : https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Près de 20 ans après avoir incarné Miranda, Andy, Emily et Nigel de façon iconique, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt et Stanley Tucci reviennent dans les rues branchées de New York et les bureaux élégants du magazine Runway dans la suite tant attendue du film culte de 2006 qui a marqué toute une génération.

Le film réunit la distribution originale, le réalisateur David Frankel et la scénariste Aline Brosh McKenna, et présente une toute nouvelle pléiade de personnages, parmi lesquels Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak et Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms et Tibor Feldman reprennent également leurs rôles de « Lily » et « Irv » du premier film.

« Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2 » est produit par Wendy Finerman, et produit par Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt et Aline Brosh McKenna. Le film sortira en salles le 1er mai.

de-DE.title: Der Teufel trägt Prada 2 | Finaler Trailer
de-DE.description:
Seht euch den neuen Trailer zu „Der Teufel trägt Prada 2“ mit dem Originalsong „Runway“ von Lady Gaga und Doechii an. Sichert euch jetzt eure Tickets und erlebt den Film ab dem 1. Mai im Kino: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Fast 20 Jahre nach ihrem legendären Auftritt als Miranda, Andy, Emily und Nigel kehren Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci in der mit Spannung erwarteten Fortsetzung des Phänomens von 2006, das eine ganze Generation prägte, zurück auf die modischen Straßen New Yorks und in die eleganten Büros des Runway Magazine.

Der Film vereint die Originalbesetzung mit Regisseur David Frankel und Drehbuchautorin Aline Brosh McKenna und präsentiert eine komplett neue Riege an Charakteren, darunter Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak und Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms und Tibor Feldman kehren in ihren Rollen als „Lily“ und „Irv“ aus dem ersten Film zurück.

„Der Teufel trägt Prada 2“ wurde von Wendy Finerman produziert, die ausführende Produktion übernahmen Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt und Aline Brosh McKenna. Der Film startet am 1. Mai exklusiv in den Kinos.

es-US.title: El diablo viste de Prada 2 | Tráiler final
es-US.description:
Mira el nuevo tráiler de El Diablo Viste de Prada 2 con la canción original “Runway”, interpretada por Lady Gaga y Doechii. Consigue tus entradas ahora y disfruta de la película solo en cines a partir del 1 de mayo: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Casi 20 años después de su icónico papel como Miranda, Andy, Emily y Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci regresan a las elegantes calles de Nueva York y a las sofisticadas oficinas de la revista Runway en la esperadísima secuela del fenómeno de 2006 que marcó a una generación.

La película reúne al elenco original con el director David Frankel y la guionista Aline Brosh McKenna, e introduce un nuevo elenco de personajes, incluyendo a Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak y Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms y Tibor Feldman también retoman sus papeles como Lily e Irv de la primera película.

“El diablo viste de Prada 2” está producida por Wendy Finerman y cuenta con la producción ejecutiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt y Aline Brosh McKenna. La película se estrena exclusivamente en cines el 1 de mayo.

it.title: Il diavolo veste Prada 2 | Trailer finale
it.description:
Guarda il nuovo trailer di Il diavolo veste Prada 2 con la canzone originale "Runway" interpretata da Lady Gaga e Doechii. Acquista subito i biglietti e vivi l'esperienza del film solo al cinema dal 1° maggio: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Quasi 20 anni dopo aver reso iconici i ruoli di Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano nelle strade alla moda di New York e negli eleganti uffici di Runway Magazine nell'attesissimo sequel del fenomeno del 2006 che ha definito una generazione.

Il film riunisce il cast principale originale con il regista David Frankel e la sceneggiatrice Aline Brosh McKenna e introduce una serie di nuovi personaggi, tra cui Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman riprendono i ruoli di "Lily" e "Irv" dal primo film.

"Il diavolo veste Prada 2" è prodotto da Wendy Finerman, con Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna come produttori esecutivi. Il film uscirà in esclusiva nelle sale cinematografiche il 1° maggio.

hi.title: द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2 | अंतिम ट्रेलर
hi.description:
लेडी गागा और डोची द्वारा गाए गए ओरिजिनल गाने "रनवे" के साथ 'द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2' का नया ट्रेलर देखें। अभी टिकट खरीदें और 1 मई को सिनेमाघरों में फिल्म का आनंद लें: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

मिरांडा, एंडी, एमिली और निगेल के रूप में अपनी यादगार भूमिकाओं के लगभग 20 साल बाद, मेरिल स्ट्रीप, ऐनी हैथवे, एमिली ब्लंट और स्टेनली टुची न्यूयॉर्क शहर की फैशनेबल सड़कों और रनवे मैगज़ीन के शानदार कार्यालयों में लौटते हैं, 2006 की उस सनसनीखेज फिल्म के बहुप्रतीक्षित सीक्वल में जिसने एक पीढ़ी को परिभाषित किया।

यह फिल्म मूल मुख्य कलाकारों को निर्देशक डेविड फ्रैंकल और लेखिका एलाइन ब्रॉश मैककेना के साथ फिर से एक साथ लाती है, और केनेथ ब्रानघ, सिमोन एशले, जस्टिन थेरॉक्स, लूसी लियू, पैट्रिक ब्राम्मल, कालेब हीरॉन, हेलेन जे. शेन, पॉलीन चालमेट, बी.जे. नोवाक और कॉनराड रिकामोरा सहित बिल्कुल नए किरदारों से परिचित कराती है। ट्रेसी थॉम्स और टिबोर फेल्डमैन भी पहली फिल्म से अपनी "लिली" और "इर्व" की भूमिकाओं को दोहरा रहे हैं।

"द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2" का निर्माण वेंडी फिनरमैन ने किया है, और माइकल बेडरमैन, करेन रोसेनफेल्ट और एलाइन ब्रॉश मैककेना इसके कार्यकारी निर्माता हैं। यह फिल्म 1 मई को सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज हो रही है।

pt-BR.title: O Diabo Veste Prada 2 | Trailer Final
pt-BR.description:
Assista ao novo trailer de O Diabo Veste Prada 2 com a música original “Runway”, interpretada por Lady Gaga e Doechii. Compre seus ingressos agora e curta o filme nos cinemas a partir de 1º de maio: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Quase 20 anos depois de suas icônicas interpretações de Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci retornam às ruas elegantes de Nova York e aos sofisticados escritórios da revista Runway na aguardada sequência do fenômeno de 2006 que definiu uma geração.

O filme reúne o elenco principal original com o diretor David Frankel e a roteirista Aline Brosh McKenna, e apresenta um elenco totalmente novo, incluindo Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman também reprisam seus papéis como “Lily” e “Irv” do primeiro filme.

“O Diabo Veste Prada 2” é produzido por Wendy Finerman e tem produção executiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. O filme estreia exclusivamente nos cinemas em 1º de maio.

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Terakhir
id.description:
Saksikan trailer baru untuk The Devil Wears Prada 2 dengan lagu orisinal “Runway” yang dibawakan oleh Lady Gaga dan Doechii. Dapatkan tiket sekarang dan saksikan film ini hanya di bioskop mulai 1 Mei: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Hampir 20 tahun setelah penampilan ikonik mereka sebagai Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai “Lily” dan “Irv” dari film pertama.

“The Devil Wears Prada 2” diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

snippet.title: BEZAF - Saad Lamjarred | Neha Kakkar | Shehnaaz Gill | Rajat Nagpal | Charif Bennis | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Bezaf featuring Saad Lamjarred & Shehnaaz Gill.

Streaming link 👉🏼 https://VirginMusicGroup.lnk.to/Bezaf

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Saad Lamjared & Neha Kakkar 
Music Composer : Charif Bennis & Rajat Nagpal 
Lyrics : Saad Lamjarred, Charif Bennis & Rana Sotal
Music Producer : Tarik Lahjaily
Flute : Adil charfi   
Music arrangement : Tarik lahjaili

Video Credits :-

Bezaf credit list 

Production house-Rs films and Production
Director-Sneha Shetty Kohli
Associate Director Amitesh Sanghani
1st AD - Shubh Desai
2nd AD - Rupesh Charan Pahari
Direction Support - Karan Dedhia
EP-Rahul Sahel 
Dop-Girish Kant
Dop Ac-Akshay
Choregrapher-Debo
Production managar-Rohit gaur,saksham mehta,gulshan
Production Assistant-Gurpreet Singh, Amarjeet
Location-Reel to Real to reel location
Location Managar- Nitin 
Jimmy jib operator- Nagraj 
Shenaz hair-Baljeet
Shenaz make up-Rajan Passi
Saad hmu-symone 
Artist costume-Victor 
Dancer Costume-Denish hemrani 
Dancer hmu-Reshma 
Dancers Provided by Octopus Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. (Raj Surani)
Coordinator - Jenny Surani
Art director- Rd
Editor : Bunty Nagi - Just Right Studioz
Colourist : Prashant B Dhotre (Dream Tone Studio)
AI - STUDIO BLO
VFX- Image Devices (I) Pvt Ltd.
Bts-vijay
Junior casting-pankaj

Saad Lamjarred team :
G.lamjarred
Redouane Bouzid 
Karim bennis
Faisal laatik

PlayDMF Team :-
Founder & CEO : Anshul Garg  
Vice President : Raghav Sharma ( Pratick Sharma)
Label Manager : Sankalp Garg
Project Head : Gaurav Arora
Legal & Digital Manager : Ashima Chauhan
PlayDMF Team : Anshu Prasad & Samrat Tyagi
Artwork : Vicky Sandhu
Accounts Manager : Sanjay Sharma & Rajkummar Jha
Asst Accounts Manager : Maninder Kaur
Special Thanks : Virgin Music India

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Virgin Music India Team :-
Head : Amit Sharma 
Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Lavanya Das & Nishtha Sikroria

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Raaton may jagaye mujhey khaab tere ,,
Raanjhay mere ,,o mirzay mere
Bhar bahrke chalku pyaar may tere,,Pyaar may tere
Raanjhay mere ,,o mirzay mere ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Jag tu mera ,,
Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Ajaz lesani
Ma khallali manqool
Allil aliya tool sahraan
Khallani sahraan khallani
(I’m at a loss for words,
There’s nothing left unsaid.
The night stretches long,
Leaving me awake, leaving me restless.)

-Ya njoum samaa
Bghito ana mn awal kelma
Haqiqa mashi hlema
F’tariqo rah dani
(Oh stars in the sky,
I sought you from the very first word.
A truth, not a dream,
Your path led me here.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Mera shingaar tu ,,
Hm ranihaar tu,,
Aaja piya aaja 
Najar utaar du ,,

Karti hai ishaaray ,,
Kispe dil haare ,,
Yeh paayal puchay,,
Hai tere baare ,,
Hai tere bare ,,

AyAmi li fatet kablek maliha maana 
Chkoun yjini fhalek ya momo ayniya…momo ayniya 
Ya jamalek ya jamalek ….
(My days before i met you… had no meaning,
Who could ever be like you, oh delight of my eyes ?!
Allah … your beauty Oh god your beauty is unbelievable I never saw like it before …) 

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Jag tu mera ,,
Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply)

Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

#Bezaf #saadlamjarred #nehakakkar #shehnaazgill #newsong #international #viral #trending

Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Ajaz lesani
Ma khallali manqool
Allil aliya tool sahraan
Khallani sahraan khallani
(I’m at a loss for words,
There’s nothing left unsaid.
The night stretches long,
Leaving me awake, leaving me restless.)

-Ya njoum samaa
Bghito ana mn awal kelma
Haqiqa mashi hlema
F’tariqo rah dani
(Oh stars in the sky,
I sought you from the very first word.
A truth, not a dream,
Your path led me here.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Mera shingaar tu ,,
Hm ranihaar tu,,
Aaja piya aaja 
Najar utaar du ,,

Karti hai ishaaray ,,
Kispe dil haare ,,
Yeh paayal puchay,,
Hai tere baare ,,
Hai tere bare ,,

AyAmi li fatet kablek maliha maana 
Chkoun yjini fhalek ya momo ayniya…momo ayniya 
Ya jamalek ya jamalek ….
(My days before i met you… had no meaning,
Who could ever be like you, oh delight of my eyes ?!
Allah … your beauty Oh god your beauty is unbelievable I never saw like it before …) 

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Success doesn't happen overnight. Jaan is a song about the real hustle.
It’s a conversation between a couple where the guy finally opens up about his journey. He talks about the hard days, the sleepless nights, and everything he had to sacrifice to make a name for himself.

snippet.title: Braj Ras (Official Video) | Hari Ras Baithak | B Praak | Jaani | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record presents "Braj Ras" 

Hari Ras Baithak is a soulful Sankirtan experience where music becomes devotion and every note carries the divine name. In an intimate baithak setting, it invites you to pause, reflect, and immerse yourself in the bliss of bhakti.


Singer - B Praak
Composition - B Praak and Traditional 
Lyrics - Jaani and Traditonal 
Music - B Praak and Mir Desai 
Video - Prateek Thakur 

Spl Thanks - Yogi and Ananda for Shyam Sundar Lyrics 

Live rhythms arranged and performed by Krishna kishor & Team

Percussionists - 
K V Prasad 
Ganesh Rao 
Samual 
Rahul 
Recorded by Lijesh Kumar (Chennai) 

Carnatic Violin - Manas Kumar 
Ethnic Strokes - Tapas Roy 
Harmonium - Shibbu ji
AC Guitars and Bass - Shomu Seal 

Instruments Recorded at MidnightOwl Studios 

Chorus - Sudhanshu Shome and Team 

Boys 
Sudhanshu Shome 
Pankaj Dixit 
Mridul Ghosh

Girls 
Bhagyashree V Mhatre
Mayuri Kudalkar 
Pallavi roy

Recorded at Input One by Samir Dharap

Mixed and Mastered by Abhishek Ghatak


Creative Director - Piyush Thakur
DOP - Nanni Gill
Editor - Mayank Thapar 
Line Producer - Neeraj Bhatt ( Bhatt Production )
1st AD - Manik Thakur
Colourist - Aman Rajowal 
VFX - Gagan Matharoo 
Local LP - Arya Chaudhary
Choreographer - Sonu Arizona
Make up artist - Gill
Creatives - Siddhesh Katkar

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.description:
Enjoy Bollywood romantic, evergreen & latest Hindi songs in stunning HDR & 4K quality with crystal clear sound ❤️

Song: Mujhe Peene Ka Shauk Nahin Pita Hun Gam Bhulane Ko 
Film: Coolie (1983)
Singers: Shabbir Kumar, Alka Yagnik
Music Composer: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi
Director: Manmohan Desai
Producer: Manmohan Desai 
Starring: Rishi Kapoor

Lyrics of Mujhe Pine Ka Shauk Nahi, Pita Hu Gam Bhulane Ko - 

mujhe pine kaa shauk nahi, pita hu gam bhulane ko

Signai, Alfie Rodriguez

Additional Grip Department - Nate Giordano, Matthew Seesta, Axel Cubias, Cody Ingham, Daniel Kusenda, Jake Condon, Shaun Giordano, Natalie Giordano, Marcial Gonzalez, Bruce Drinnon, Gaither Narron, Isaiah Soto, Blake Danchik, Sean Blair, Erik Covarrubias, Jose Gonzalez

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/teamsabrina

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@teamsabrina  

Lyrics:
Take your shoes off
Thank you for dinner baby
I had a really great time
I really loved the conversation
And that your car self drives
The pineapple air freshener
Is my favorite kind
Well this is me but
if you have time
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
Baby what's mine is now yours
The couch is really comfy comfy
Got some Chips Ahoy
If you're hungry hungry
You don't need to love me, love me, love me
I'm just so proud of my design
(to dim the lights)
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
But never enter through the back door
House tour
Yeah, I spent a little fortune on the waxed floors
We can be a little reckless cause it's insured
I'm pleasured to be your hot tour guide
Baby what's mine is now yours
(Oh baby if you come inside, if you come inside
I might let you uh)
My house is on pretty girl avenue
My house was especially built for you
Some say it's a place where your dreams come true
My house
Could be your house too!
So um
Are you coming in or what?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

Testo:
Togliti le scarpe
Grazie per la cena, tesoro
Mi sono divertita molto
Ho adorato la conversazione
E il fatto che la tua auto si guidi da sola
Il deodorante per auto all'ananas
È il mio preferito
Beh, questa sono io, ma
se hai tempo
Vuoi fare un tour della casa?

Potrei portarti al primo, secondo, terzo piano
E ti prometto che niente di tutto questo è una metafora
Voglio solo che tu entri
Tesoro, ciò che è mio ora è tuo
Il divano è davvero comodo
Ho dei Chips Ahoy
Se hai fame, fame
Non hai bisogno di amarmi, amarmi, amarmi
Sono solo così orgoglioso del mio design
(per abbassare le luci)
Vuoi fare un giro della casa?

Potrei portarti al primo, secondo, terzo piano
E ti prometto che niente di tutto questo è una metafora
Voglio solo che tu entri
Ma non entrare mai dalla porta sul retro
Tour della casa
Sì, ho speso una piccola fortuna per i pavimenti cerati
Possiamo essere un po' spericolati perché è assicurato
Sono felice di essere la tua guida turistica sexy
Tesoro, ciò che è mio ora è tuo
(Oh tesoro, se entri, se entri
Potrei lasciarti entrare)
La mia casa è in Pretty Girl Avenue
La mia casa è stata costruita apposta per te
Alcuni dicono che sia un posto dove i sogni si avverano
La mia casa
Potrebbe essere anche la tua casa!

Allora, ehm
Entri o no?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

Letra:
Tire os sapatos
Obrigada pelo jantar, querido
Eu me diverti muito
Adorei a conversa
E que seu carro dirige sozinho
O aromatizador de abacaxi
É o meu favorito
Bem, essa sou eu, mas
se você tiver tempo
Quer um tour pela casa?
Eu poderia te levar ao primeiro, segundo, terceiro andar
E prometo que nada disso é uma metáfora
Só quero que você entre
Amor, o que é meu agora é seu
O sofá é muito confortável
Tem uns Chips Ahoy
Se você estiver com fome

Le désodorisant à l’ananas

si tu as le temps

अतिरिक्त विद्युत विभाग - लुइस “कोआच” कोलाज़ो, जो एस्कैंडेल, जेक कैस्टर, एंडरसन लाउ, पैट्रिक मैट्स, केनी टकर, हार्पर थॉमस, चैंडलर टैंगो, ब्रेंट कीज़, टॉड वार्न, टायलर टैंगो, ब्लेक फार्मर, जस्टिन उसामी, मार्लन ओ'ब्रायन, बॉब शूमेकर, टेडी वेइसफस, नेट ब्राउन, राउल सर्वेंटेस, जेमी डनफोर्ड, मार्शल कूपर, क्रूज़ जिमेनेज़, टी.जे. सिग्नाई, अल्फी रोड्रिगेज़

की ग्रिप - मैट प्लानर
अतिरिक्त ग्रिप विभाग - नेट जियोर्डानो, मैथ्यू सीस्टा, एक्सल क्यूबियास, कोडी इंगम, डैनियल कुसेंडा, जेक कोंडन, शॉन जियोर्डानो, नताली जियोर्डानो, मार्सियल गोंजालेज, ब्रूस ड्रिनन, गैथर नारोन, इसाया सोटो, ब्लेक डैनचिक, सीन ब्लेयर, एरिक कोवरुबियास, जोस गोंजालेज

स्टंट - पैट्रिक रोमानो, पॉल लैकोवारा, गाय फर्नांडीज

बोल:
अपने जूते उतार दो
रात के खाने के लिए धन्यवाद बेबी
मुझे बहुत अच्छा लगा
मुझे बातचीत बहुत पसंद आई
और तुम्हारी कार सेल्फ ड्राइव
पाइनएप्पल एयर फ्रेशनर
मेरा पसंदीदा है
खैर, ये मैं हूँ लेकिन
अगर तुम्हारे पास समय हो
तो क्या तुम चाहोगी घर का दौरा?
मैं आपको पहली, दूसरी, तीसरी मंज़िल पर ले जा सकती हूँ
और मैं वादा करती हूँ कि यह सब कोई रूपक नहीं है
मैं बस चाहती हूँ कि आप अंदर आएँ
बेबी, जो मेरा है वह अब तुम्हारा है
सोफा बहुत आरामदायक है
मेरे पास चिप्स अहोय हैं
अगर आपको भूख लगी है
आपको मुझे प्यार करने की ज़रूरत नहीं है
मुझे बस अपने डिज़ाइन पर गर्व है
(रोशनी धीमी करते हुए)
क्या आप घर का दौरा करना चाहती हैं?

मैं तुम्हें पहली, दूसरी, तीसरी मंज़िल तक ले जा सकती हूँ
और मैं वादा करती हूँ कि यह सब कोई रूपक नहीं है
मैं बस चाहती हूँ कि तुम अंदर आओ
लेकिन पीछे के दरवाज़े से कभी मत आना
घर का दौरा
हाँ, मैंने पॉलिश किए हुए फ़र्श पर काफ़ी पैसा खर्च किया है
हम थोड़े बेपरवाह हो सकते हैं क्योंकि इसका बीमा है
मुझे तुम्हारा हॉट टूर गाइड बनकर खुशी हो रही है
बेबी, जो मेरा है वो अब तुम्हारा है
(ओह बेबी, अगर तुम अंदर आओ, अगर तुम अंदर आओ
तो शायद मैं तुम्हें...)
मेरा घर प्रीटी गर्ल एवेन्यू पर है
मेरा घर खास तुम्हारे लिए बना है
कुछ लोग कहते हैं कि यह वो जगह है जहाँ तुम्हारे सपने सच होते हैं
मेरा घर
तुम्हारा घर भी हो सकता है!

तो...
क्या तुम अंदर आ रही हो या नहीं?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

Songtext:
Zieh deine Schuhe aus
Danke für das Abendessen, Baby
Ich hatte eine richtig schöne Zeit
Das Gespräch war super
Und dass dein Auto von selbst fährt
Der Ananas-Lufterfrischer
ist mein Lieblingsduft
So, das bin ich, aber
wenn du Zeit hast
Möchtest du eine Hausführung?

Ich könnte dich ins erste, zweite, dritte Stockwerk mitnehmen.
Und ich verspreche dir, das ist keine Metapher.
Ich will nur, dass du reinkommst.
Baby, was mir gehört, gehört jetzt dir.
Die Couch ist so richtig gemütlich.
Ich hab Chips Ahoy.
Wenn du richtig Hunger hast,
du musst mich nicht lieben, lieben, lieben.
Ich bin einfach so stolz auf mein Design.

(Licht dimmen)
Willst du eine Hausführung?

Ich könnte dich ins erste, zweite, dritte Stockwerk mitnehmen.
Und ich verspreche dir, das ist keine Metapher.
Ich möchte einfach, dass du reinkommst.
Aber geh niemals durch die Hintertür.
Hausbesichtigung
Ja, ich habe ein kleines Vermögen für die gewachsten Böden ausgegeben.
Wir können ein bisschen leichtsinnig sein, denn es ist versichert.
Es freut mich, deine heiße Tourguide zu sein.
Baby, was mir gehört, gehört jetzt dir.
(Oh Baby, wenn du reinkommst, wenn du reinkommst, lasse ich dich vielleicht rein.)
Mein Haus liegt in der Straße der hübschen Mädchen.
Mein Haus wurde speziell für dich gebaut.
Man sagt, es ist ein Ort, an dem Träume wahr werden.
Mein Haus
Könnte auch dein Haus sein!

Also ähm
Kommst du rein oder nicht?

snippet.title: NOSTALGIA BAIT? 🙈 | Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review | Akshay Kumar
snippet.description:
I had so many expectations from this reunion but the trailer leaves more to be desired. The movie called #bhoothbangla features #akshaykumar in the lead role and him reuniting with director #priyadarshan . The #bollywood movie gives us flashbacks to the franchise of #bhoolbhulaiya but will it be as successful? The movie stars #rajpalyadav #pareshrawal #wamiqagabbi and #tabu in prominent roles. I am genuinely curious, is this even funny? I hope you like the video on:-

Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review | Akshay Kumar | Priyadarshan | Wamiqa Gabbi | Tabu | Rajpal Yadav | Paresh Rawal | Bollywood Movie Review

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Teaser: Chhaava शी तुलना, Riteish Deshmukh Look चर्चेत, राजा शिवाजी सिनेमा गाजणार का ?
snippet.description:
#BolBhidu #RajaShivaji #RitieshDeshmukh

नाम के आगे राजा लगाने से कोई राजा नही बनता, संजय दत्तचा खर्जातला आवाज येतो आणि त्यानंतर स्क्रीनवर पहिल्यांदा संजय दत्तच दिसतो, पण खऱ्या अर्थाने हिट होतो संजय दत्तचा दुसरा डायलॉग, मराठो के मुकद्दर में या तो मौत लिखी है या फिर गुलामी, रितेश देशमुखच्या राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरच्या टीझरमधला हा सिन. टिझरमध्ये आऊसाहेब जिजाऊ दिसतात, अफझलखान दिसतो, बडी  बेगम दिसते, सईबाई राणीसाहेब दिसतात आणि छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या भूमिकेत दिसतो रितेश देशमुख. राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरची प्रचंड चर्चा होती, पिक्चरची स्टोरी, ट्रिओलॉजी, कोण कुणाचा रोल करणार अशा अनेक गोष्टी चर्चेत होत्या, त्यात धुरंधर-२ सोबत काही थिएटर्समध्ये टिझर रिलीझ झाला, पण जेव्हा हा टीझर युट्युबवर आला, तेव्हा मात्र मिक्स्ड रिऍक्शन आल्या, अनेकांनी राजा शिवाजीची तुलना छावाशी केली, कुणी कौतुक केलं, कुणी टीका केली, पण यात एक प्रश्न उभा राहिला छावाला जमलं ते राजा शिवाजी सिनेमाला जमेल का ? पाहुयात या व्हिडीओमधून.. 

चॅनेलला सबस्क्राईब करायला विसरू नका. नोटिफिकेशन चालू ठेवा म्हणजे लेटेस्ट व्हिडीओचे नोटिफिकेशन तुम्हाला मिळत राहतील. 
https://www.youtube.com/@BolBhidu

✒️ आपणही आपले लेख, विषय व इतर माहिती आम्हाला bolbhidu1@gmail.com या मेल आयडीवर पाठवू शकता. 

Connect With Us On🔎

➡️ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/​BolBhiduCOM
➡️ Twitter : https://twitter.com/bolbhidu
➡️ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bolbhidu
➡️Website: https://bolbhidu.com/

नाम के आगे राजा लगाने से कोई राजा नही बनता, संजय दत्तचा खर्जातला आवाज येतो आणि त्यानंतर स्क्रीनवर पहिल्यांदा संजय दत्तच दिसतो, पण खऱ्या अर्थाने हिट होतो संजय दत्तचा दुसरा डायलॉग, मराठो के मुकद्दर में या तो मौत लिखी है या फिर गुलामी, रितेश देशमुखच्या राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरच्या टीझरमधला हा सिन. टिझरमध्ये आऊसाहेब जिजाऊ दिसतात, अफझलखान दिसतो, बडी  बेगम दिसते, सईबाई राणीसाहेब दिसतात आणि छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या भूमिकेत दिसतो रितेश देशमुख. राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरची प्रचंड चर्चा होती, पिक्चरची स्टोरी, ट्रिओलॉजी, कोण कुणाचा रोल करणार अशा अनेक गोष्टी चर्चेत होत्या, त्यात धुरंधर-२ सोबत काही थिएटर्समध्ये टिझर रिलीझ झाला, पण जेव्हा हा टीझर युट्युबवर आला, तेव्हा मात्र मिक्स्ड रिऍक्शन आल्या, अनेकांनी राजा शिवाजीची तुलना छावाशी केली, कुणी कौतुक केलं, कुणी टीका केली, पण यात एक प्रश्न उभा राहिला छावाला जमलं ते राजा शिवाजी सिनेमाला जमेल का ? पाहुयात या व्हिडीओमधून.. 

चॅनेलला सबस्क्राईब करायला विसरू नका. नोटिफिकेशन चालू ठेवा म्हणजे लेटेस्ट व्हिडीओचे नोटिफिकेशन तुम्हाला मिळत राहतील. 
https://www.youtube.com/@BolBhidu

✒️ आपणही आपले लेख, विषय व इतर माहिती आम्हाला bolbhidu1@gmail.com या मेल आयडीवर पाठवू शकता. 

Connect With Us On🔎

➡️ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/​BolBhiduCOM
➡️ Twitter : https://twitter.com/bolbhidu
➡️ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bolbhidu
➡️Website: https://bolbhidu.com/

snippet.title: LIVE Now: प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का प्रवचन | 📅 07 अप्रैल 2026
snippet.description:
🔴 LIVE: पूज्य प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का दिव्य प्रवचन
| भक्ति • प्रेम • आध्यात्मिक ज्ञान |

📅 07 अप्रैल 2026 (मंगलवार) | IST
📍 Vrindavan Prem Ras Channel

🌸 “जब मन भगवान के नाम में लग जाता है, तब जीवन की सबसे बड़ी समस्या भी छोटी लगने लगती है।” 🌸

🙏 क्या मन में चिंता और अशांति रहती है?
🙏 क्या आप सच्ची शांति और भक्ति का मार्ग खोज रहे हैं?

तो आइए…
आज के इस दिव्य LIVE प्रवचन से जुड़िए और
भक्ति, प्रेम और आत्मिक शांति की उस अमृतधारा में प्रवेश कीजिए
जो जीवन को भीतर से बदल देती है।

✨ आज के प्रवचन में जानिए:

🔹 मन को भगवान में कैसे लगाएँ
🔹 कठिन समय में भी भक्ति कैसे बनाए रखें
🔹 नाम जप की वास्तविक शक्ति क्या है

🌟 LIVE प्रवचन की विशेष बातें:

✅ जीवन की समस्याओं पर आध्यात्मिक दृष्टि
✅ मन को शांति देने वाली मधुर वाणी
✅ भक्ति मार्ग पर चलने की सरल प्रेरणा

📡 LIVE प्रसारण:
🗓️ 07 अप्रैल 2026 (मंगलवार) | IST

🔔 अभी Subscribe करें:
👉 @VrindavanPremRas-ql7yf

👇 अपने प्रश्न Comment में लिखें —
संभव है महाराज जी LIVE में उत्तर दें। 👇

➡️ #PremanandJiMaharaj
➡️ #LivePravachan
➡️ #BhaktiMarg
➡️ #Vrindavan
➡️ #PremRas

📌 याद रखें:
👍 LIKE करें
📤 SHARE करें
🔔 SUBSCRIBE करें और Bell Icon दबाएँ

hi.title: LIVE Now: प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का प्रवचन | 📅 07 अप्रैल 2026
hi.description:
🔴 LIVE: पूज्य प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का दिव्य प्रवचन
| भक्ति • प्रेम • आध्यात्मिक ज्ञान |

📅 07 अप्रैल 2026 (मंगलवार) | IST
📍 Vrindavan Prem Ras Channel

🌸 “जब मन भगवान के नाम में लग जाता है, तब जीवन की सबसे बड़ी समस्या भी छोटी लगने लगती है।” 🌸

🙏 क्या मन में चिंता और अशांति रहती है?
🙏 क्या आप सच्ची शांति और भक्ति का मार्ग खोज रहे हैं?

तो आइए…
आज के इस दिव्य LIVE प्रवचन से जुड़िए और
भक्ति, प्रेम और आत्मिक शांति की उस अमृतधारा में प्रवेश कीजिए
जो जीवन को भीतर से बदल देती है।

✨ आज के प्रवचन में जानिए:

🔹 मन को भगवान में कैसे लगाएँ
🔹 कठिन समय में भी भक्ति कैसे बनाए रखें
🔹 नाम जप की वास्तविक शक्ति क्या है

🌟 LIVE प्रवचन की विशेष बातें:

✅ जीवन की समस्याओं पर आध्यात्मिक दृष्टि
✅ मन को शांति देने वाली मधुर वाणी
✅ भक्ति मार्ग पर चलने की सरल प्रेरणा

snippet.title: Official Trailer - Eken Babu: Purulia-e Pakrao | Anirban C, Suhotra, Somak | 15 APR | hoichoi
snippet.description:
লাল মাটির দেশে একেন - উপাসনা আশ্রম,
আমিষ খাওয়ার চেষ্টা বৃথা - সবই পন্ডশ্রম!
নীরবতা বজায় রাখতে সবাই হিমসিম...
একেন নিজেই খাচ্ছে case, সঙ্গে ঘোড়ার ডিম!

#EkenBabu - Purulia-e Pakrao: Official Trailer | Series directed by Joydeep Mukherjee, premieres 15th April, only on #hoichoi.

Anirban Chakrabarti Suhotra Mukhopadhyay Somak Ghosh Tuban Subho Pramanick Subhadeep B Guha Padmanabha Dasgupta Late Sujan Dasgupta Mahendra Soni SVF #Trailer

Credits:
Cast: Anirban Chakrabarti, Suhotra Mukhopadhyay, Somak Ghosh, Sarthak Mullick, Sumanta Mukherjee, Abhishek Bose, Saoli Chattopadhyay, Animesh Rana Bhaduri, Shankar Chakraborty, Sandip Bhattacharya
Director - Joydeep Mukherjee
Original Story – Late Sujan Dasgupta
Script, Screenplay, Dialogues – Padmanabha Dasgupta
Cinematographer - Tuban
Editor - Subho Pramanick
Music - Subhadeep B Guha
Production House - SVF
............................................................................................
hoichoi is where Bengali culture lives forward. 

Since 2017, we've been home to 600+ movies, 200+ originals, and 2000+ hours of stories that know you. From Kolkata's para-r adda to New York's subway rides, we connect 250 million Bengalis to the stories they're proud to share.

We're not just streaming entertainment - we're celebrating Bengali culture that belongs confidently in every space, every conversation, every recommendation. Boldly Bangali.

Subscribe for stories worth sharing. Because Bengali culture deserves the spotlight.
............................................................................
Enjoy & stay connected with us!

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

ta.title: சரோஜா சமன்னிக்கல்லோ | அதிகாரப்பூர்வ டீசர் | ஷார்ட்ஃப்ளிக்ஸ் | இப்போதே பாருங்கள்
ta.description:
"சரோஜா சமனிக்கல்லோ" படத்தின் அதிகாரப்பூர்வ டீசரை வழங்குகிறோம்

திருமணத்திற்கு 10 நாட்கள், காதலியை காணவில்லை... எது சரியாக நடக்கலாம்?

"சரோஜா சமனிக்கல்லோ" - ஷார்ட்ஃபிளிக்ஸில் பிரத்தியேகமாக ஸ்ட்ரீமிங் இப்போது பாருங்கள் !!
https://shortflix.page.link/RZVW

இயக்கியவர்:
அலிபாபா அன்சாரி

தயாரித்தவர்:
யாஷிகா புரொடக்ஷன்ஸ்
டி.பாலசுப்ரமணி

நடித்தவர்கள்: 
சுனிதா தாமஸ்
ஜென்னி
வைஷ்ணவி நாயக்
ரம்யா
ரிது மந்திரம்
ஷகீலா
இளையா
குறி
மாதங்கோபால்

இசை: 
சாண்டி டி.எஃப். தொழில்நுட்பம்

ஒளிப்பதிவாளர் : 
மாயோன் டிஎஃப்டி

அனந்த் மணி

டேவிட் அஜய்

snippet.title: SPOWER IS LIVE | What’s New with HERO XTREME? 1,00,000 UC CRATE OPENING  | BGMI | SPOWER GAMING |
snippet.description:
"🔥 Spower Gaming is back with a bang!
Aaj ke stream mein BGMI ka full dhamaka spray control, clutch fights, 1v4 wipes… sab kuch ON FIRE!
Saath hi ek special bike feature breakdown bhi: Hero Xtreme 125R & Xtreme 160R 4V ka real-world gaming-style review.
Agar aap BGMI, bikes, performance features aur real-time reactions enjoy karte ho…
ye stream bilkul miss nahi karna!
🏍️ Hero Xtreme 125R – Mini Beast Upgrade
* Dual Channel ABS – better safety, better control
* Cruise Control – long rides = smooth AF
* 3 Ride Modes – Eco, Power, Road
* 4.2” Multi-Colour LCD Display – clean & futuristic
🏍️ Hero Xtreme 160R 4V – Street Predator
* New LED Headlight – brighter & sharper
* Cruise Control – high-speed chilling
* 3 Ride Modes – Rain, Road, Sports
* 4.2” Multi-Colour LCD Display – premium look
🎮 Stream Highlights
🔥 OP spray transfers
🔥 High-intensity BGMI gameplay
🔥 Bike feature breakdown in Spower style
🔥 Chat vibes always on top
Test ride link pinned hai — check zaroor karna!
Like, Share & Subscribe if you vibe with Spower Gaming ⚡"

Tuta Hua Dil Hai, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein

snippet.title: Thari Bolero - Harsh Mudgil , Swara Verma ( Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi ) Official Song
snippet.description:
Harsh Mudgil Presents New Haryanvi Song 2026" " written , composed by Harsh Mudgil and Music Also by Harsh Mudgil. 


Follow Me On Insta-https://instagram.com/harsh__mudgil

#harshmudgil #tharibolero #terayaarmudgil 
#themudgil #ritaulirohtak 

AVAILABLE ON ALL OTHER PLATFORMS....

 Song Credits : 

Song - Thari Bolero

Singer - Harsh Mudgil
https://instagram.com/harsh__mudgil

Female Singer  - Swara Verma 

Lyrics - Harsh Mudgil 

Composer -  Harsh Mudgil

Music - Harsh Mudgil 

Mixing  - Sagar Kaushik

Mastering - Sagar Kaushik 

Recording Engineering - Sagar Kaushik

Video - Lakshay Vashishth

Digital Media - Sting Tune 

Online Promotion - Bholenath🤝🔱

Label -@Harsh Mudgil  
----------------------------------------------


Lyrics-

Thari Bolero 

F- Jha Bhi Jao Sath MaiJao
Pakki Jodi Doyaa Ki

M- Sarkaar Avaidh Bataya Kare 
Taskari Chale Un Lohya Ki

F-
Na suii tikti 100 t niche 
 
M- Bairi Dekh Aankhya N Miche

Jo Apne Aap Mai Gundey Sai
Gandya Ki Dhala Cholla Rai

F- 
Chaale Thari Bolero Paadti
Naake Or Sab Tolla Nai
Male- 
Karke Vaake Khujaa Baabe 
Paade Sabke Wholla Nai



1

F-
 kaan Pai vertue Laake Nai
 Thum Naad Pai teko Asla Nai

M- Hum Maang Firoti Lala Pai
Chutki Mai Metdya Maslya Nai

F- 
Kai Kai Mukbar Shehar Mai Sai
Tere Kitna Dum Hai Seene Mai

M- 
Kade Khatu Ji Kade Salasar
Mhari Jaale Gaadi Mhine Mai



F- Teri Ankhya Mai Mane Rum Laage 
M-  Na Na Madam Ji Bum Laage 
Mhare Aave Dudhiya Aisa 
Jo pistol Rakhe Sai Dola mai




Rap 
M- Aaye Hayee   R gori Mhare Apne Asool
F- Oye Hoe tu Role rakkhe  kyate Befizool

M-

M-Aay Haay Rai Gori Hum Paar Jaava Maar 
Banda Tohya Bhi Na Paana

F- Oee Hoee Tera Naam Chaale Itnak
Bairi Tne Jaane Har City Ala Thana

Chehre Pai Smile Pavgi 
Khi Baat Rai Misail pavgi
Jai Aaja Koi Yaara Nai Bhsad 
Call Mudgil Ki Dial Pavgi


2- F-
Tne Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi
 Jalan Ke Tender Lere S

M-
Gori Chaale Gaadi Mhari
Silencor Inke Dhume Dere Sai


F- Teri Baata Mai Mane Dum Laage 
Producer Nai Kyu Kam Laage
Mai inke Lable Khoduga 
Jai aagya apne Rolla Mai

Na suii tikti 100 t niche 
 
M- Bairi Dekh Aankhya N Miche

Jo Apne Aap Mai Gundey Sai
Gandya Ki Dhala Cholla Rai

F- 
Chaale Thari Bolero Paadti
Naake Or Sab Tolla Nai
Male- 
Karke Vaake Khujaa Baabe 
Paade Sabke Wholla Nai



1

F-
 kaan Pai vertue Laake Nai
 Thum Naad Pai teko Asla Nai

M- Hum Maang Firoti Lala Pai
Chutki Mai Metdya Maslya Nai

F- 
Kai Kai Mukbar Shehar Mai Sai
Tere Kitna Dum Hai Seene Mai

M- 
Kade Khatu Ji Kade Salasar
Mhari Jaale Gaadi Mhine Mai



F- Teri Ankhya Mai Mane Rum Laage 
M-  Na Na Madam Ji Bum Laage 
Mhare Aave Dudhiya Aisa 
Jo pistol Rakhe Sai Dola mai




Rap 
M- Aaye Hayee   R gori Mhare Apne Asool
F- Oye Hoe tu Role rakkhe  kyate Befizool

M-

M-Aay Haay Rai Gori Hum Paar Jaava Maar 
Banda Tohya Bhi Na Paana

F- Oee Hoee Tera Naam Chaale Itnak
Bairi Tne Jaane Har City Ala Thana

Chehre Pai Smile Pavgi 
Khi Baat Rai Misail pavgi
Jai Aaja Koi Yaara Nai Bhsad 
Call Mudgil Ki Dial Pavgi


2- F-
Tne Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi
 Jalan Ke Tender Lere S

M-
Gori Chaale Gaadi Mhari
Silencor Inke Dhume Dere Sai


F- Teri Baata Mai Mane Dum Laage 
Producer Nai Kyu Kam Laage
Mai inke Lable Khoduga 
Jai aagya apne Rolla Mai

* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

snippet.title: Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan - मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko |
snippet.description:
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Music & Composer: 
Singer :Bhumika Sharma 
Additional Lyrics :
Lyrics : Treditional
Music Label :Mk Bhakti Juction


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani

#PramodPremiYadav #ChandaRaj #JaanKurabanKaDehab #BhojpuriSong2026 #NewBhojpuriSong #BhojpuriMusic #PramodPremiHits #LatestBhojpuri #RomanticSong #BhojpuriVideo #SuperhitBhojpuri #JanKurbanKaDehab

Lyrics - 

जय माँ सरस्वती 
            गीत रवि यादव 

F प्यार तोहसे करब हो, तोहरे प मरब हो 
   केहु कुछो कहे हम तनिको ना डरब हो 

दिल तोहरे के दान क देहब 

M कायर ना हई ई एलान क देहब 
तोहरे ला जान कुर्बान क देहब 

सबसे अलग पहचान क देहब 
तोहरे ला जान कुर्बान क देहब 

                   अन्तरा-१

F तोहके जानीले, आपन मानिले 
    बाड़ा हीरो हमार पहचानिले 

M गोरी रानी बनाके हम राखब हो 
     छोड़ी तोहरा ना दोसरा प ताकब हो 

F फेल सबकर प्लान क देहब 

M कायर ना —————————! 
    ऊँचा तोहार आन बान शान क देहब 

तोहरे—————————————!

                      अन्तरा-२

F हम लुभा गईनी , पगला गईनी 
   सुनके येतना बड़ाई शरमा गईनी 

    M  रवि प्रमोद के प्यार बा अनोखा हो 
          येहीजा सबका के मिले ना मौका हो 

F दुनिया के अंजान क देहब 

M कायर ना——————————!
     नामे तहरा दुगो मकान क देहब 

तोहरे ला———————————-!

snippet.title: Sankat Mochan Naam Tiharo - Hanuman Ashtak | Hanuman Jayanti Special Bhajan | Mohit Pathak
snippet.description:
On this auspicious occasion of Hanuman Jayanti, Divine India proudly presents a heartfelt rendition of the Sankat Mochan Hanuman Ashtak, sung with devotion by Mohit Pathak  
This powerful prayer by the saint-poet Tulsidas is a timeless call for strength, protection, and guidance from Bajrangbali, the remover of all obstacles and the epitome of devotion.

🗓️ Celebrate the divine birth of Lord Hanuman — the fearless protector, the greatest devotee of Lord Rama, and the Sankat Mochan (reliever of troubles).

Singer: Mohit Pathak  
Music : Vickky Agarwal
Arranged by : Akash Rijia
Lyrics : Traditional 
Video : GraphieEdit
Label : Playbeatz Entertainment  

🎧 Tune in, chant along, and let this sacred ashtak fill your heart with devotion and peace.

🙏 Jai Hanuman Gyan Gun Sagar!
🔔 Don’t forget to LIKE, COMMENT, SHARE & SUBSCRIBE to *Divine India* for more spiritual and devotional content.

#HanumanJayanti #MohitPathak #HanumanAshtak #SankatMochan #DivineIndia #DevotionalSong #Bhajan #Tulsidas #HanumanBhajan #JaiHanuman

snippet.title: Who wins? Technical Guruji vs Jonathan Gaming | Unboxing OnePlus Nord 6 - Extended Version
snippet.description:
The ultimate all-rounder is here.
Tune in on April 7, 7 PM IST for the OnePlus Nord 6 launch. 

Click To Stay Notified: https://www.amazon.in/b?node=216828981031

#NeverSettle

Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆

snippet.title: Surviving to Become the Strongest Dragon in Day of Dragons!
snippet.description:
Surviving to Become the Strongest Dragon in Day of Dragons!
Day of Dragons Malayalam Gameplay

📩 Business & Promotions : pfdesuza@gmail.com

About The Game
Welcome to Day of Dragons Malayalam Gameplay — a survival experience where we don’t just fight dragons… we become one. In this open-world survival game, we start as a young dragon and slowly grow stronger by exploring, hunting, and surviving in a dangerous fantasy world filled with enemies and environmental threats.
As we grow, our dragon evolves — gaining new abilities, stronger attacks, and the power to fly. Survival is not easy. We must manage hunger, health, and stamina while defending ourselves from other dragons and hostile creatures. Every fight is risky, and one wrong move can end everything.
The game blends survival mechanics, RPG progression, and dragon combat, creating intense and sometimes funny moments, especially when things don’t go as planned. From learning how to fly properly to surviving brutal fights, every moment feels unpredictable and exciting.
If you enjoy survival games, dragons, open-world exploration, and Malayalam gameplay, this video is for you. Let’s see how long we can survive in a world where only the strongest dragons rule.

00:00 - Intro 
00:20 - Gameplay
19:34 - End

#dayofdragons #malayalamgameplay #dragongame #survivalgame #pfdesuza #malayalamgaming #openworldgame #gameplay

snippet.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️ 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haan… 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haan… 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.

en-US.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
en-US.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️

Credits:
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics:

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah
I have found a companion for my journey
My heart was held back, but I fell in love
Lord, thank you for this happiness
What more do I need in life?
I have found a companion for my journey

I never thought I would fall in love
like this My chain will be lost.

Oh, yes…

I never thought I would fall in love.

My chain will be lost like this.
My heart started beating when I saw you.

My desire for you made me yearn like a madman.

I chose you for my love.

Thank you, God, for this happiness.

What more could I want in life?

I found a companion for my travels.

Hey hey hey hey hey

I wrote your name with every breath.

Your message even with my heartbeats.

Oh, yes…

I wrote your name with every breath.
Your message is written even on my heartbeats
This moment spent in your arms
Yes, this is greater for me than ages
I loved life for the sake of it
Thank you, God, for this happiness
What more do I need in life?
I have found a companion for my journey

I love you, Ajay, I love you, Ajay, I love you, Ajay
I am going crazy with happiness
My feet are in the air
I am soaring
Don't let me fall, Ajay
Don't let me fall
Take care of me, Ajay
Ajay I love you.

en.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
en.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️ 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haan… 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haan… 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.

snippet.title: CHOO CHOO CHARLES EXE 🆚 TRAIN THOMAS EXE 🆚 CURSED THOMAS MONSTER ❄️TILES HOP
snippet.description:
CHOO CHOO CHARLES EXE 🆚 TRAIN THOMAS EXE 🆚 CURSED THOMAS MONSTER ❄️ TILES HOP
Get ready for an epic and scary train monster battle in Tiles Hop! 🚂🔥 In this exciting video, Choo Choo Charles EXE, Train Thomas EXE, and the powerful Cursed Thomas Monster face off in a dark and intense music challenge!
Watch these cursed trains jump across the frozen Tiles Hop track, unleash their evil powers, and battle to become the ultimate EXE monster. Each character brings crazy energy, horror vibes, and thrilling action that fans will love!
If you enjoy EXE battles, monster transformations, and fun Tiles Hop gameplay, this video is perfect for you!
💥 Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications for more amazing VS battles every day!
👇 Comment below: Which monster should battle next?

snippet.description:
Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala

Song : Dil Kehta Hai 
Singer : Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Lyrics : Majrooh Sultanpuri
Music : Anu Malik
Director : Mansoor Khan
Producer : Ratan Jain
Star Cast : Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala.

Song Lyrics-

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

🎮 Experience the thrill of urban life in **Indian Thift Auto Simulator Gameplay**! 🚗✨ Dive into adrenaline-pumping streets where you can unleash your wild side with an exciting mix of cars and bikes. Join us as we explore the newer features, unique vehicles, and dynamic missions that make this game a must-play for every gamer. From racing through bustling markets to mastering daring heists, follow along as we drive, customize, and conquer all challenges! Don't forget to hit the subscribe button for more incredible gameplay adventures. 🔔 #IndianThiftAuto #Gameplay #Cars #Bikes #GamingVibes
🌟 Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled ride in our newest video featuring Indian Thift Auto Simulator Gameplay! 🚗💨 Dive into the vibrant streets as we explore incredible cars and bikes in a totally immersive environment. Watch as we take on thrilling challenges, showcase stunning visuals, and uncover hidden treasures throughout the city. From gripping action sequences to hilarious moments, this gameplay promises fun for every viewer. Don't forget to hit that LIKE button and SUBSCRIBE for more epic content! 🛵✨ Comment below and share your thoughts or tips, and let’s cruise into adventure together! #IndianThiftAutoSimulator #GamingJoy
Get ready to dive into the chaotic world of "Indian Thift Auto Simulator"! In this electrifying new gameplay, we showcase the heart-pounding moments of crafting epic car and bike adventures in a uniquely vibrant Indian setting. Watch as we navigate through crowded streets and experience the thrill of unexpected twists! 😎 Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newcomer, our gameplay offers valuable tips and jaw-dropping maneuvers that will keep you entertained. Buckle up and prepare for high-speed action, hilarious encounters, and ultimate thrills! Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more Indian Thift Auto Simulator gameplay! 🚗💨
🚗💨 Get ready to rev up the excitement with our latest Indian Thift Auto Simulator gameplay video! Dive into an immersive world where chaos and adventure collide. Watch as we navigatethrough the vibrant streets filled with thrilling car and bike action. Experience jaw-dropping stunts, wild chases, and breathtaking graphics that bring the essence of India to life! Whether you’re a booster of open-world games or just curious about what India has to offer in the gaming world, this video is a must-watch. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and hit that bell icon for more epic gameplay updates! 🎮🔥 #IndianThiftAuto #Gameplay

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star the Showstopper Challenge (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star the Showstopper Challenge in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attack which showcases the Rocket Backpack Equipment from the upcoming Medal Event. This will be the first Epic Equipment for the Dragon Duke. Best of luck with your 3 stars though and thank you for supporting the channel with Code Judo!

Suggested Video:

es.description:
Cómo hacer 3 estrellas en el desafío Fiesta Pirotécnica en Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth proporciona un tutorial para el nuevo evento de ataque que muestra el Equipamiento Mochila Cohete del próximo evento de medallas. Este será el primer equipamiento épico para el Duque Dragón. ¡Buena suerte con tus 3 estrellas y gracias por apoyar el canal con Código Judo!
